Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Avernus Incarnation]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 4''' — The Avernus Incarnation was the only one not missing from under the Hanging Trees.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 18''' — The Incarnation of Avernus has a face like a human woman with bird-of-prey eyes and four colored wings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 18''' — The Avernus Incarnation has talons instead of fingernails.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 18''' — The Avernus Incarnation can see pieces of the future.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 19''' — The Avernus Incarnation has wings and raptor eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 19''' — The Avernus Incarnation has mismatched wings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — The Avernus Incarnation is capable of carrying on intelligible conversations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 24''' — Leah compares Queen Cynara's advice to the Avernus Incarnation's advice.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
